# SignalR Browser Client

This directory contains the locally vendored browser build of
`@microsoft/signalr` version `10.0.0`.

- Source package: `@microsoft/signalr`
- License: MIT
- Runtime use: local static asset only, no CDN or npm request
- Refresh command: `npm run vendor:signalr`

The package version is pinned in `package.json` and `package-lock.json`.
